revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:4 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:4月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 4월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:四月廿八]][[zh:四月廿八]]
{{Not to be confused with|April 28|qq=April 28}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=四月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 4월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar April|qq=}} '''April 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|April (Lunisolar)|ja|4月 (旧暦)|lt=April (Uzuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 4th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Emperor Kōgyoku|ja|皇極天皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Kōgyoku|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 斉明天皇|1=Empress Kōgyoku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q235296}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|643|en|643|qid=Q31634|lt=643|1=643}} {{ill|May 21|en|May 21|qid=Q2580|lt=May 21|1=May 21}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgyoku|ja|皇極天皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Kōgyoku|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 斉明天皇|1=Empress Kōgyoku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q235296}} moves the capital to {{ill|Asuka Itabuki Palace|ja|飛鳥板蓋宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asuka Itabuki Palace|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 板蓋宮|1=Itabuki Palace|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11532703}} . * {{ill|Ninju|en|Ninju|qid=Q1373077|lt=Ninju (era)|1=Ninju}} 1 (Julian {{ill|851|en|851|qid=Q29966|lt=851|1=851}} {{ill|June 1|en|June 1|qid=Q2625|lt=June 1|1=June 1}} ) – Era name changed from {{ill|Kashō|en|Kashō|qid=Q1373157|lt=Kashō (Japan)|1=Kashō}} to Ninju. * {{ill|Kōji (Heian period)|en|Kōji (Heian period)|qid=Q1194459|lt=Kōji (era)|1=Kōji (Heian period)}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1142|en|1142|qid=Q19614|lt=1142|1=1142}} {{ill|May 25|en|May 25|qid=Q2585|lt=May 25|1=May 25}} ) – Era name changed from {{ill|Eiji (era)|en|Eiji (era)|qid=Q1194167|lt=Eiji (Japan)|1=Eiji (era)}} to Kōji due to the {{ill|Kōshi Kakurei|ja|Kōshi Kakurei (historical edict)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshi Kakurei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * {{ill|Jishō|en|Jishō|qid=Q1194671|lt=Jishō (Japan)|1=Jishō}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1177|en|1177|qid=Q19694|lt=1177|1=1177}} {{ill|May 27|en|May 27|qid=Q2587|lt=May 27|1=May 27}} ) – A great fire breaks out in Kyoto’s Tomikōji district, destroying 20,000 houses, including the {{ill|Heian Palace|en|Heian Palace|qid=Q304501|lt=Heian Palace|1=Heian Palace}} and the {{ill|Daigokuden|ja|大極殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daigokuden|qq=}} . * {{ill|Kenchō|en|Kenchō|qid=Q1194270|lt=Kenchō (era)|1=Kenchō}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1253|en|1253|qid=Q5498|lt=1253|1=1253}} {{ill|May 26|en|May 26|qid=Q2586|lt=May 26|1=May 26}} ) – {{ill|Nichiren|1=Nichiren|2=ja|3=日蓮|4=ko|5=니치렌|6=de|7=Nichiren|8=es|9=Nichiren|10=fr|11=Nichiren|12=it|13=Nichiren|14=nl|15=Nichiren|16=no|17=Nichiren|lt=Nichiren|qid=Q311478ja|Nichiren|1=Nichiren|2=ja|3=日蓮|4=ko|5=니치렌|6=de|7=Nichiren|8=es|9=Nichiren|10=fr|11=Nichiren|12=it|13=Nichiren|14=nl|15=Nichiren|16=no|17=Nichiren|lt=Nichiren|qid=Q31147812=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nichiren|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} preaches the teachings of {{ill|Shōdai|ja|唱題|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōdai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 題目|1=Daimoku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1848179}} for the first time at the summit of Mount Seichō in {{ill|Awa Province (Chiba)|en|Awa Province (Chiba)|qid=Q1053044|lt=Awa Province (Chiba)|1=Awa Province (Chiba)}} , modern-day southern {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|qid=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture|1=Chiba Prefecture}} . * {{ill|Shōō (Kamakura period)|en|Shōō (Kamakura period)|qid=Q1327371|lt=Shōō (era)|1=Shōō (Kamakura period)}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1288|en|1288|qid=Q5550|lt=1288|1=1288}} {{ill|May 29|en|May 29|qid=Q2589|lt=May 29|1=May 29}} ) – Era name changed from {{ill|Kōan (Kamakura period)|en|Kōan (Kamakura period)|qid=Q389180|lt=Kōan (Japan)|1=Kōan (Kamakura period)}} to Shōō. * {{ill|Ōchō|en|Ōchō|qid=Q1327136|lt=Ōchō (era)|1=Ōchō}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1311|en|1311|qid=Q5731|lt=1311|1=1311}} {{ill|May 17|en|May 17|qid=Q2575|lt=May 17|1=May 17}} ) – Era name changed from {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|延慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō (Japan)|1=Enkei (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306063}} to Ōchō. * {{ill|Gen'ō|en|Gen'ō|qid=Q1193925|lt=Gen'ō (era)|1=Gen'ō}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1319|en|1319|qid=Q5767|lt=1319|1=1319}} {{ill|May 18|en|May 18|qid=Q2576|lt=May 18|1=May 18}} ) – Era name changed from {{ill|Bunpō|en|Bunpō|qid=Q987788|lt=Bunpō (era)|1=Bunpō}} to Gen'ō. * {{ill|Shōkei (era)|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei (era)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1069086}} 1 / {{ill|Genkō (1331–1334)|en|Genkō (1331–1334)|qid=Q1194556|lt=Genkō (era)|1=Genkō (1331–1334)}} 2 (Julian {{ill|1332|en|1332|qid=Q6001|lt=1332|1=1332}} {{ill|May 23|en|May 23|qid=Q2583|lt=May 23|1=May 23}} ) – The Northern Court changes the era name from {{ill|Gentoku|en|Gentoku|qid=Q1327385|lt=Gentoku (Japan)|1=Gentoku}} to Shōkei. * {{ill|Ryakuō|en|Ryakuō|qid=Q1146182|lt=Ryakuō (era)|1=Ryakuō}} 3 / {{ill|Kōkoku|en|Kōkoku|qid=Q1143592|lt=Kōkoku (Japan)|1=Kōkoku}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1340|en|1340|qid=Q6056|lt=1340|1=1340}} {{ill|May 25|en|May 25|qid=Q2585|lt=May 25|1=May 25}} ) – The Southern Court changes the era name from {{ill|Engen (Japan)|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engen (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1194159}} to Kōkoku. * [[Shitoku]] 1 / {{ill|Genchū|en|Genchū|qid=Q1146236|lt=Genchū (era)|1=Genchū}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1384|en|1384|qid=Q6347|lt=1384|1=1384}} {{ill|May 18|en|May 18|qid=Q2576|lt=May 18|1=May 18}} ) – Era name changed from {{ill|Kōwa (Muromachi period)|en|Kōwa (Muromachi period)|qid=Q1145818|lt=Kōwa (Japan)|1=Kōwa (Muromachi period)}} to Genchū due to the {{ill|Kōshi Kakurei|ja|Kōshi Kakurei (historical edict)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshi Kakurei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * {{ill|Civilization|en|Civilization|qid=Q8432|lt=Bunmei (era)|1=Civilization}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1469|en|1469|qid=Q6566|lt=1469|1=1469}} {{ill|June 8|en|June 8|qid=Q2621|lt=June 8|1=June 8}} ) – Era name changed from {{ill|Ōnin|en|Ōnin|qid=Q1143903|lt=Ōnin (Japan)|1=Ōnin}} to Bunmei. * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1586|en|1586|qid=Q6739|lt=1586|1=1586}} {{ill|June 15|en|June 15|qid=Q2613|lt=June 15|1=June 15}} ) – {{ill|Asahi no kata|en|Asahi no kata|qid=Q838180|lt=Asahi-hime|1=Asahi no kata}} , sister of {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qid=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} , is married to {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} . * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|qid=Q10889567|lt=Genna (Japan)|1=Yuanhe}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1615|en|1615|qid=Q6784|lt=1615|1=1615}} {{ill|May 25|en|May 25|qid=Q2585|lt=May 25|1=May 25}} ) – The {{ill|Summer Siege of Osaka|ja|大坂夏の陣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Summer Siege of Osaka|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大坂の陣|1=Siege of Osaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q475780}} begins. * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō (Japan)|1=Kyōhō}} 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1729|en|1729|qid=Q6952|lt=1729|1=1729}} {{ill|May 25|en|May 25|qid=Q2585|lt=May 25|1=May 25}} ) – Chinese merchants from the Qing Dynasty present an elephant from {{ill|Vietnam|ja|交趾国|1=Jiaozhi|2=ja|3=交趾郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Vietnam|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q2591393}} to {{ill|Emperor Nakamikado|en|Emperor Nakamikado|qid=Q314817|lt=Emperor Nakamikado|1=Emperor Nakamikado}} . * {{ill|Genbun|en|Genbun|qid=Q1145754|lt=Genbun|1=Genbun}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1736|en|1736|qid=Q6989|lt=1736|1=1736}} {{ill|June 7|en|June 7|qid=Q2616|lt=June 7|1=June 7}} ) – Era name changed from Kyōhō to Genbun following the accession of {{ill|Emperor Sakuramachi|en|Emperor Sakuramachi|qid=Q313870|lt=Emperor Sakuramachi|1=Emperor Sakuramachi}} . == Births == * {{ill|Tenna|en|Tenna|qid=Q1145289|lt=Tenna (era)|1=Tenna}} 3 (Gregorian {{ill|1683|en|1683|qid=Q7651|lt=1683|1=1683}} {{ill|May 24|en|May 24|qid=Q2584|lt=May 24|1=May 24}} ) – {{ill|Honjō Michiaki|ja|本庄道章|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Honjō Michiaki|1=Honjō Michiakira|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11520314}} , first lord of {{ill|Takatomi Domain|en|Takatomi Domain|qid=Q3034540|lt=Takadaka Domain|1=Takatomi Domain}} (+ {{ill|1725|en|1725|qid=Q6932|lt=1725|1=1725}} ). * {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|qid=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki|1=Hōreki}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1757|en|1757|qid=Q7635|lt=1757|1=1757}} {{ill|June 14|en|June 14|qid=Q2612|lt=June 14|1=June 14}} ) – {{ill|Yamada Kengyō|ja|山田検校|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamada Kengyō|1=Yamada Kengyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q92924021}} , founder of the Yamada school of {{ill|koto music|ja|箏曲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/koto music|1=sokyoku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11603109}} (+ {{ill|1817|en|1817|qid=Q6958|lt=1817|1=1817}} ). == Deaths == == Commemorations == * {{ill|Komabiki|ja|駒牽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komabiki|1=Komahiki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11668427}} – A traditional event that occurs during months with 31 days.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|27|4|29|3|28|5|4|0428|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ja:斉明天皇2nd year のEvents]]
[[ar:April 28 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月廿八]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月廿八]]
